description_long: This upright vacuum cleaner features a predominantly blue and black color scheme, with a robust cylindrical body and a telescoping central shaft. The base is wide and rounded, likely housing the motor and suction mechanism, and is equipped with a set of wheels for mobility. The central shaft includes multiple articulated joints, suggesting adjustable height or folding capability, and a prominent handle at the top for easy maneuvering. The design is modern and functional, with visible seams and panels indicating access points for maintenance or dust bin removal. The vacuum appears to be constructed mainly from molded plastic, with some metallic and rubber components for structural support and flexibility. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and the dust container is not clearly seen from any angle.
description: A modern, upright blue and black vacuum cleaner with a telescoping shaft, articulated joints, and a prominent handle, designed for urban cleaning tasks. The base is rounded and mobile, with no visible dust container or power cord.
description_view_0: Front view shows the handle, central shaft, and rounded base, with the main control panel and access points visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the articulated joints and the profile of the handle, as well as the side panel and wheel housing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the handle, shaft, and base, with no visible controls or dust container.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other side of the articulated joints and wheel housing, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is vertically oriented, rounded at the top, and integrated into the upper shaft, designed for ergonomic gripping and easy maneuvering.
attribute_wheel_type: Two medium-sized wheels are partially visible at the base, likely made of hard plastic or rubber, designed for smooth rolling on flat surfaces.
